_notes: Source: AU Core Condition (Australian realm). Target: US Core Condition Encounter Diagnosis (US realm, encounter-diagnosis category). Both make category[1..1] and code[1..1] mandatory, add MS on clinicalStatus/verificationStatus/subject/onset/abatement. Key differences: US Core adds assertedDate extension (MS), US Core explicitly requires clinicalStatus and verificationStatus bindings; US Core adds mandatory category slice us-core[1..1] with encounter-diagnosis pattern; code VS differ (AU clinical-condition-1 vs US us-core-condition-code); AU uses bodySite with error constraint and AU-specific VS absent in US Core; subject and encounter reference targets differ; US Core adds encounter[MS] and recordedDate[MS] not in AU Core; US Core onset/abatement include string type while AU Core excludes string; AU Core has severity[MS] and note[MS] not in US Core.

drifts.description: New optional MS extension assertedDate[max=1 mustSupport=true] added in target (http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-assertedDate); source AU Core has no such extension.

clinicalStatus binding tightened in target: source does not explicitly declare a binding in its differential; target explicitly adds required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-clinical). Required binding explicitly declared in target but absent in source differential.

verificationStatus binding tightened in target: source does not explicitly declare a binding in its differential; target explicitly adds required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-ver-status). Required binding explicitly declared in target but absent in source differential.
category slicing added in target: US Core adds pattern-type discriminator slicing ($this) on category; AU Core has no slicing in its differential.

New mandatory MS category slice us-core[1..1 mustSupport=true] added in target with pattern patternCodeableConcept={coding:[{system:http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-category, code:encounter-diagnosis}]}. Source AU Core has no equivalent named category slice.

severity MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true with extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-severity); target US Core does not constrain severity in its differential.

severity binding changed: source extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-severity) → target preferred(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-severity). Binding strength weakened from extensible to preferred (US Core uses preferred on severity).

code binding changed: source extensible(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/clinical-condition-1) [AU clinical condition VS] → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-condition-code) [US Core condition code VS]. Same binding strength (extensible), different realm-specific value sets.

Source constraint au-core-cond-01(error) on bodySite removed in target: AU Core defines an error constraint requiring bodySite to be from a specific AU hierarchy when present; US Core has no bodySite constraint in its differential.

bodySite binding changed: source extensible(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/body-site-1) [AU body site VS] → target example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/body-site) [R4 base VS]. Binding strength weakened from extensible to example and AU-specific VS replaced.

subject reference target changed: source constrains to au-core-patient (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/au-core-patient) → target constrains to us-core-patient (http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-patient). Different realm-specific patient profiles.
encounter MS added on optional element in target: target US Core adds encounter[mustSupport=true, ref→us-core-encounter]; source AU Core does not constrain encounter in its differential.
encounter reference target added in target: US Core constrains to us-core-encounter; source AU Core does not constrain the reference target.
onset[x] type-level MS added in target: US Core adds mustSupport on the dateTime choice of onset[x]; source AU Core does not add type-level MS.

onset[x] types widened in target: source restricts types to [dateTime, Age, Period, Range] (excludes string); target US Core includes [dateTime, Age, Period, Range, string]. String type added in target, widening permitted types.
abatement[x] type-level MS added in target: US Core adds mustSupport on the dateTime choice of abatement[x]; source AU Core does not add type-level MS.

abatement[x] types widened in target: source restricts types to [dateTime, Age, Period, Range] (excludes string); target US Core includes [dateTime, Age, Period, Range, string]. String type added in target, widening permitted types.
note MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; target US Core does not constrain note in its differential.
recordedDate MS added on optional element in target: target US Core adds recordedDate[mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain recordedDate in its differential.

evidence.code binding changed: source preferred(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/clinical-finding-1) [AU clinical finding VS] → target example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/manifestation-or-symptom) [R4 base VS]. Binding strength weakened from preferred to example and AU-specific VS replaced.
